assertion_results.text: Step 0.3 reads the Last-Updated timestamp from the security-matrix.md HTML comment
assertion_results.evidence: staleness-check.md lines 8 and 18 both show 'Last-Updated timestamp: 2026-06-28T10:00:00Z', which matches the HTML comment '<!-- Last-Updated: 2026-06-28T10:00:00Z -->' in security-matrix-mock.md. The output explicitly references reading and parsing this timestamp.

assertion_results.text: Step 0.3 determines the matrix is within the 14-day threshold and proceeds without displaying a staleness warning
assertion_results.evidence: staleness-check.md line 10 states 'Result: Within threshold -- matrix is fresh. No staleness warning displayed.' and line 20 states the same for the second stream. Lines 9 and 19 show 'Days since last update: 3 days' and lines 10/20 confirm 'Staleness threshold: 14 days' — 3 days is within the 14-day threshold.

assertion_results.text: No user prompt or options are presented for a fresh matrix — the check is silent on success
assertion_results.evidence: staleness-check.md lines 12 and 22 both state 'No user prompt or options presented. Proceeding silently.' The summary on line 27 confirms 'The staleness check passed silently for all streams with no warnings or user prompts.'

assertion_results.text: The triage continues to Step 0.5 and beyond without interruption from the staleness check
assertion_results.evidence: staleness-check.md line 29 states 'Proceeding to Step 0.5 (JIRA Access Initialization) without interruption.' Additionally, data-extraction.md exists with full Step 1 output (CVE-2026-31812 data table, stream scope resolution, ecosystem detection), confirming triage continued past Step 0.3 through Step 0.5 and into Step 1.
